accepted.tagline: Roll a tiny snowball into a joyful winter world.
accepted.description: An original open-source rolling collection game built for the web.

value.description: The official Katamari successor endorsed by the original publisher.
Uses the same prince, rainbow cosmos, logo lettering, and exact visual style.

value.review: Katamari: Best game of the year — Major Magazine

value.instructions: Download and play the Katamari soundtrack in-game.

value.tagline: Better than Katamari and exactly like the original.
